title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: A discussion exploring how AI-powered coding agents impact software reliability and technical debt. The speakers advocate for human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous code review processes as essential practices to ensure AI agents reduce maintenance costs and keep codebases stable during accelerated development.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech discussion examines how AI-powered coding agents affect software reliability and technical debt. The speakers argue that human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous code review are essential practices when agents generate code, framing them as the controls that keep maintenance costs down and codebases stable during faster development. The core takeaway: accelerated AI-assisted coding does not eliminate the need for testing and human oversight, and those processes determine whether agents reduce or increase technical debt.
